where we do more deep research, and basically suggest a rewrite, if we can't completely guarantee that the content is accurate.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX as a partner for Crux's content and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Crux's Challenge:** Current SEO agency content (2 articles/mo) is too generic for its niche marketplace audience. The goal is to scale targeted, high-intent content in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A white-glove service using AI workflows and human experts to deliver 5 articles/week, handling all execution from strategy to CMS publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** GrowthX's AI workflows are agentic (self-correcting) and use deep "artifacts" (personas, brand guides) to ensure content is hyper-relevant and accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Decision Timeline:** Crux is evaluating partners over the next 1–2 months to finalize its FY26 SEO strategy and replace its off-boarding agency.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

## Topics

### Crux's Content & SEO Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Maximize value from in-house SEO and content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**Problem:** Current agency content is too generic, not audience-specific, and lacks the flexibility required for Crux's sophisticated market.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Audience:** A niche, two-sided marketplace.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Supply:** Clean energy developers & manufacturers (enterprise/Fortune 5000).](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**Demand:** Corporate taxpayers & financial institutions.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:** Focus on specific, high-intent clusters (e.g., "carryback tax credits"), not broad, high-volume terms.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** Currently 2 SEO articles/month; the 2026 goal is 1 blog post/week.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [**Growth Marketing Need:** Improve efficiency for integrated campaigns, which are currently manual in Asana.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Model:** A white-glove service combining AI workflows with human experts.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**Origin:** Founded by Marcel (ex-CMO of HashiCorp, Service Titan) to automate the organic content engine he built at DeepGram.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Service Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Strategy:** SEO & GEO (AI Answer Engine Optimization).](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Execution:** 5 articles/week (new or refresh), starting with editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Handles all CMS publishing and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Monitoring:** Provides LLM visibility and competitive tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [**Process Inputs:** Brand documents, audience personas, product marketing materials, and a kickoff call.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

### GrowthX's AI Workflow & Examples

  - [**Core Process:** Agentic AI workflows (self-correcting until quality scores are met) are guided by human experts.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator: "Artifacts"**](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Deep, verticalized context documents (e.g., construction operations manager persona) that detail fears, motivations, and how to win trust.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Weave in customer stories and unique data to differentiate content.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [**Workflow Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
    1.  [**Research Plan:** Generate research questions based on keyword data and artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
    2.  [**Drafting:** Create an initial draft.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
    3.  [**Human Review:** Editors add specific instructions (e.g., "add 3 bullet points for a female entrepreneur").](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
    4.  [**Fact-Checking:** Break the article into chunks → perform deep research → suggest rewrites with specific attributions (e.g., citing a person's quote instead of a general statement).](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
    5.  [**Optimization:** Add cross-links, source citations, SEO metadata, and on-brand images.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [**Client Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**AugmentCode:** 3x organic traffic in 6 months, enabling them to shut off ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Published 700+ pages, including a programmatic vendor directory and interactive per diem calculator.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

### Scope & Future Possibilities

  - [**Initial Focus:** On-site content (blogs, guides) to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**Future Scope:** After 3–6 months of on-site success, explore other workstreams like:](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Repurposing content for social media.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Creating sales enablement materials.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Third-party thought leadership (Nate's suggestion).](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [**Backlinking:** Not a core service; GrowthX prioritizes content creation ROI over backlink acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send Crux the GrowthX overview deck, pricing information, and a scheduling link.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [**Crux Team:** Review materials and reconvene to discuss the FY26 SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/brz-Mpx8TyYts6zzS9c_edov-Ynytccc?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)

action_items.description: Email Nate/Holly/Elaine deck + pricing; request paid-search keywords + brand/audience/product docs
